title: LocalOperationLog
description: Local-first operation log entry capturing a governed workspace operation (terminal command, browser capture, local agent execution, sync event, or file operation). Supports replay safety, durability tiers, and local-to-remote operation mapping.

id.description: Stable local-operation-log URN. Must be unique per log entry.

operationType.description: Typed class of the workspace operation.

surface.description: Product surface that emitted this log entry.

actorRef.description: Human subject, agent, or service authority reference.

agentRegistryRef.description: Agent Registry identity ref for non-human actors.

deviceRef.description: DeviceIdentity URN for the device emitting this log entry.

sessionRef.description: Optional session URN for grouping related entries.

durabilityTier.description: Operation durability tier. ephemeral = memory-only; local-durable = persisted locally; synced = propagated to remote; archived = long-term governed storage.

replaySafe.description: Whether this operation can be safely replayed. Side-effecting operations (file writes, shell commands with mutations) must set this to false unless replay constraints are provided.

replayConstraints.description: Constraints governing safe replay of this operation, if replaySafe is true.

payloadMode.description: Payload capture mode. Raw sensitive content is denied by default.

payload.description: Optional bounded payload. Must not contain raw credentials, secrets, or unrestricted command output.

artifactRefs.description: LocalArtifactRef URNs produced or consumed by this operation.

remoteOperationRef.description: Remote WorkspaceOperation or OperationEvent URN for local-to-remote mapping.

workspaceOperationRef.description: Prophet-core WorkspaceOperation URN if this entry maps to a canonical workspace operation.

operationTaskRef.description: Prophet-core OperationTask URN if this entry maps to a canonical operation task.

operationEventRef.description: Prophet-core OperationEvent URN if this entry maps to a canonical operation event.

policyGateRecordRef.description: Prophet-core PolicyGateRecord URN if a policy gate was evaluated for this operation.

encryptionProfileRef.description: LocalEncryptionProfile URN if payload or artifacts are encrypted at rest.

policyDecisionRefs.description: Policy Fabric decision refs governing this operation.
